content: Between E3 Kaith and E2 Tiwil, who is better for arc 1-2?

- Since you seem to be just starting focusing on 4 characters will clear up to chapter 5 at least can probably do Tulu-Murphy-Ramona-Ogier for a tentacle team
- Will be hard to give advice for Ultra and Caro since you don't have any key units to build around or even any of the respective realm characters to build with <:wisdom:1400771656510734356> 
- For Caro you have Aigis who is actually a good support cause of her exalt, embryo generation, vulnerable app, and Aliemus battery. If you mix with Caro in a non Caro focus team you get access to Embryos for Aliemus and furnace for healing
- For Ultra you only have Erika who you *don't* want to run in Arc 1. If you mix Ultra in non Ultra focus team the main thing is you have access to Annihilation for for draw 1 and 1 Arithmetica. Can use Ultra Round for utility just note non pure Ultra or non Ultra/Chaos mix will have nerf Ultra Round (25% reduction on Damage, Shield, HP recovery, Keyflare, Aliemus, STR changes, Poison, Counter, and Bleed)
- With the anni reruns no better time than now to get Ultra characters. Castor is a solid shielder and becomes a slow but strong nuke DPS at E3. Pollux is a strong DPS who you ideally want E3 for qol and more damage output. If you want an Ultra focus team can choose either one to pull for or for a really strong performance pull both as they work really well together. Personal anecdote E0 Castor and E2 Pollux carried me basically all of arc 1 with me getting E3 Pollux and E2 Castor around chapter 9 with same E3 pollux and now E3 Castor in same team still putting in work for arc 2.
- Caro rerun is a nuke and AoE DPS Doresain who can serve you well E0 throughoout arc 1. Just know later on he's a rather needy character to invest in. If you want to get into Caro the most important character to get is Thais who is the best support for not just Caro but can be played outside of Caro focused teams.

Daffodil / Pandia / Horla / gDoll

Or this crazy thing
People kinda show Pandia beating things as a flex.
Any suggestions for a team that is easy to use or does not cost too many sources?

Unfortunately not really.

Pandia's exalt was problematic in the past with Daffodil.

Daff and Pandia were both nerfed for being too strong. I think they undid the Daffodil nerf, but kept Pandia's nerf.

So now Pandia underperforms. This is one of the sore spots for older veterans.
I tried a lot in the past to make Pandia more viable, but then Nautila exalt just outperforms her. So I switched to Nautila.

Ah, it makes sense, I need to check more good teams that follow the meta now <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

<@709319580035842088> 
First thing, first. Kath needs E3, mandatory. Without it, it’s much harder to stack Fiamma, AND more importantly, she doesn’t scale. 

Now you could use Doreslain + Kath, if Kath is E0, but that would be more a Doreslain Main DPS, and Kath Sub-DPS. The issue witb this is that in endgame content, you will struggle due to not enough damage, and both wanting your Arithma. The issue with E3 Kath, and Doreslain is Kath wants you to play her cards to generate Fiamma to scale, not to play Doreslain Cards, rendering Doreslain useless. Kath comps are all about enabling Kath with 3 Supports/Wardens.

Generally Kath teams will be Mono Chaos or Ultra Chaos. The reasoning is because Kath wants Keyflare to Posse every turn, cycle more Fiamma to scale via playing more Kath Cards, more ways to “cheat” more Kath Cards into play, more Arithma to play Kath Cards, and more Kath Exalts(resulting in more Kath Cards).

Mono Chaos gains the effect that at the EoT, you gain Keyflare and on Posse, you gain Aliemus on Posse use.

Ultra gives you access to Ultra Turn. Which is a Extra Turn for more Kath shenanigans. You can also “Annihilate” each turn to remove the leftmost card in Ultra Space for a “Insight”(Gain 1 Arithma, Draw 1 Card). 

Awakeners for Kath:
Chaos Awakeners: Karen/Ryker/TRamona/Ramona/Ogier

Ultra Awakeners: Tinct/Winkle/Clementine/Horla

Hameln and Thais are generally absurdly strong Support Awakeners that can be slotted into any team. It’s not a “strong with Kath” Awakeners, for there are BiS Awakeners for each team, *sometimes*. Thais wants E2, but functions at E0. Hameln can be E0, and E2 is just a nice add on.

Pickman + Thais is a Whale Comp w/ OE Pickman cheese. Furthermore, Pickman and Thais will eat Kath’s Arithma which will take more micro managing, if you run the two with Kath. It’s doable, but Whale + Think more.
